health_conditions: left shoulder soreness from gym injury
right shoulder torn rotator cuff 80% tear confirmed via MRI

benefits.description: virtually no pain in left shoulder, very minimal pain in right shoulder during certain exercises only
able to perform way more workload and shoulder workouts; previously trained delts only 5 times in prior year, now able to train regularly

protocol_notes: Started Jan 5th at 500mcg 2x daily in each shoulder (AM and PM), planned to continue until Feb 5th then reduce to 250mcg 2x daily for another month. Injections done subcutaneously right at the injury site, occasionally intramuscular. Purchased from Canada Peptides Direct during a promotion (buy 5 get 1 free). User explicitly stated no negative side effects observed.
